snippet.title: The life of the super-rich in Central Africa | DW Documentary
snippet.description:
Many millionaires live in the Democratic Republic of Congo, one of the world's poorest countries. This film depicts some of those who have made fortunes amid the chaos, including musicians, mining bosses, entrepreneurs and preachers.

The DRC is rich in raw materials, but only a few profit from its natural resources. While 60% of Congo's inhabitants live on less than $1.25 per day, businessmen, artists, former rebel leaders and evangelists are reaping the rewards of economic growth. In the capital, Kinshasa, these new rich live in safe and luxurious enclaves, while children toil in coltan mines in the eastern part of the country.
Fally Ipupa has made his money with music. Others rely on their business acumen, like Patricia Nzolantima, who founded a taxi company and aims to give more opportunities to women.
With 3,000 mine workers, Cooperamma is the largest employer in North Kivu, in the east of the DRC. Managing director Robert Seninga says his coltan mines are extremely well-run, yet safety standards are poor. Coltan, a globally coveted mineral, is used in cell phones and other devices. ItвҖҷs both a blessing and a curse for the Congo. It makes some rich, but for others it means death. The region still suffers from ethnic and factional conflicts, with money from illegal coltan smuggling financing new violence. ItвҖҷs a vicious cycle.

ЩҖЩҖЩҖЩҖЩҖ

snippet.title: Watch live: The Duke of Edinburgh, Prince Philip, has died
snippet.description:
Buckingham Palace has announced that His Royal Highness Prince Philip has died.

The Duke was married to Queen Elizabeth II for more than 70 years and became the longest-serving consort in British history.

His Royal Highness passed away peacefully this morning at Windsor Castle.

"Jireh" was written by Steven Furtick, Chandler Moore, Naomi Raine and Chris Brown.

Lyrics:
IвҖҷll never be more loved than I am right now
WasnвҖҷt holding You up so thereвҖҷs nothing I can do to let You down
DoesnвҖҷt take a trophy to make You proud
IвҖҷll never be more loved than I am right now

Going through a storm but I wonвҖҷt go down
I hear Your voice carried in the rhythm of the wind to call me out
You would cross an ocean so I wouldnвҖҷt drown
YouвҖҷve never been closer than You are right now

Jireh You are enough
Jireh You are enough
I will be content in every circumstance
Jireh You are enough

DonвҖҷt wanna forget how I feel right now
On the mountaintop I can see so clear what itвҖҷs all about
Stay by my side when the sun goes down
DonвҖҷt wanna forget how I feel right now

IвҖҷm already loved
IвҖҷm already chosen
I know who I am
I know what YouвҖҷve spoken
IвҖҷm already loved
More than I could imagine
And that is enough

That is enough
You are enough
So I am enough

If He dresses the lilies with beauty and splendor
How much more will He clothe you
How much more will He clothe you
If He watches over every sparrow
How much more does He love you
How much more does He love you

More than you ask, think or imagine
According to His power working in us
ItвҖҷs more than enough

Written by Steven Furtick, Chandler Moore, Naomi Raine and Chris Brown

Lyrics:
Grandma used to pray out loud
By her bed every night
To me it sounded like mumbling
Like she was out of her mind
She said boy this kind of praying is what saved my life
You oughta try it some time
Now I know she was right

She was talking to Jesus
She was talking to Jesus
SheвҖҷd been talking to Jesus for all of her life

Mama used to drag me to church
Sunday morning and Wednesday nights
Khaki pants and a polo shirt
Boy I put up a fight
She said, son, one day youвҖҷll thank me for having God in your life
And yeah I know she was right
Yeah my mama was right

Cause now IвҖҷm talking to Jesus
She got me talking to Jesus
She got me talking to Jesus
Yeah my mama was right
Cause now IвҖҷm talking to Jesus
Yeah I love talking to Jesus
And I'll be talking to Jesus
For the rest of my life

What a friend we have in Jesus
What a friend we have in Jesus
What a friend we have in Jesus
Oh

I've got 3 of my own now
Trying to raise them up right
My oldest is 15 and I remember what that was like
Trying to deal with the drama, trying to figure out the questions in life
IвҖҷve been looking for a way to show him how to make it alright

Then he walked in my room while I was saying my prayers the other night
He said IвҖҷll come back later, I can tell you got a lot on your mind
I said itвҖҷs not an interruption, you couldnвҖҷt have picked a better time
Cause I was just talking to Jesus, come over and give it a try

We started talking to Jesus
We started talking to Jesus
We started talking to Jesus
Oh
And now heвҖҷs talking to Jesus
Thank God heвҖҷs talking to Jesus
I hope heвҖҷs talking to Jesus
For the rest of his life

ThereвҖҷs no wrong way to do it
ThereвҖҷs no bad time to start
It don't have to sound pretty
Just tell him whatвҖҷs on your heart
Cause itвҖҷs not a religion
ItвҖҷs more like a friendship
Just talk to your Father
Like you are his kid

Just start talking to Jesus
Just start talking to Jesus
You can talk to Jesus
Whenever you like

Just start talking to Jesus
Just start talking to Jesus
Just keep talking to Jesus
For the rest of your life

snippet.title: HIGHLIGHTS | Arsenal vs Liverpool (0-3) | Premier League
snippet.description:
We slumped to a second consecutive defeat at the Emirates, and in truth can have few complaints about the result.

Champions Liverpool put us under pressure for most of the 90 minutes, while up front it was a frustrating evening for our forwards, who had very little to work with all game.

We held the visitors at bay for the first half, but once Diogo Jota was brought on, Liverpool moved up a gear and ran out comfortable winners.

It was a scrappy opening 15 minutes from both sides, before Liverpool slowly began to force us deeper and deeper into our own territory.

In fact we were struggling to get out of our own half at times, and the visitors really should have taken the lead when Trent Alexander-Arnold cut the ball back to the unmarked James Milner, but his first-time effort was off target.

The first-half stats did not look pretty for us. We managed just one shot compared to Liverpool's six, while the visitors enjoyed twice as much possession as us in the opening 45 minutes. To make matters worse we lost Kieran Tierney to injury just before the break.

Tierney's replacement, Cedric, had our first effort on target of the match, forcing a diving save from Alisson after being set up by Pierre-Emerick Aubameyang.

But the general flow of play remained towards our own goal, and Liverpool eventually took the lead through substitute Jota. His powerful header was too hot for Bernd Leno to handle after meeting Trent Alexander-Arnold's cross.

Five minutes later Mohamed Salah doubled the lead when he threaded the ball through Leno's legs at the near post.

We were architects of our own downfall for the third goal. Gabriel gave the ball away when playing out from the back, Liverpool worked it back into our box for Jota to gratefully tuck home his second.

The result leaves us stranded in ninth place, as attention once again turns to the Europa League this midweek.

#arsenal #premierleague #liverpool

Enjoy match highlights, training and behind the scenes to get closer to the likes of Pierre-Emerick Aubameyang, David Luiz, Vivianne Miedema, Nicolas Pepe, Alexandre Lacazette, Leah Williamson, Bernd Leno, Danielle van de Donk, Willian, Hector Bellerin, Jordan Nobbs, Bukayo Saka, Kim Little, Gabriel Martinelli, Thomas Partey and more.

snippet.title: вҖңThy Will Be DoneвҖң- Saint Israella Bushiri's Burial Ceremony
snippet.description:
Dont forget to subscribe to get the latest Videos from Prophet Shepherd Bushiri by clicking this link:https://bit.ly/3h2BRFq

вҖңMy wife and I are broken but not destroyed. The badness of the devil cannot change the goodness of God. 
It is the wish of every parent to be buried by their children, not the other way around. 
However, when God was calling me, he taught me to bow to his sovereign will. 
I have taught my wife that, I have taught my kids that, and I preach that. 

Are we the first people to go through this? Am I the first person? No. 
You have all gone through this. And be strengthened and be encouraged. What you went through is what we are going through. 

But we all have faith and hope that Jesus Christ is the same yesterday, the same today and the same forever. 
What is remaining for us, with Israella, is not for her to come where we are, but when God, at his own sovereign time comes, we will both go where she is. 
With all our hearts, we have accepted the call of God over our daughter Israella.вҖқ
tags: major 1 jesus christ ECG Church Prophetic Chanel Prophecies
Holy Spirit T B Joshua Prophet Uebert Angel Prophet Makandiwa

localized.title: вҖңThy Will Be DoneвҖң- Saint Israella Bushiri's Burial Ceremony
localized.description:
Dont forget to subscribe to get the latest Videos from Prophet Shepherd Bushiri by clicking this link:https://bit.ly/3h2BRFq

вҖңMy wife and I are broken but not destroyed. The badness of the devil cannot change the goodness of God. 
It is the wish of every parent to be buried by their children, not the other way around. 
However, when God was calling me, he taught me to bow to his sovereign will. 
I have taught my wife that, I have taught my kids that, and I preach that. 

Are we the first people to go through this? Am I the first person? No. 
You have all gone through this. And be strengthened and be encouraged. What you went through is what we are going through. 

But we all have faith and hope that Jesus Christ is the same yesterday, the same today and the same forever. 
What is remaining for us, with Israella, is not for her to come where we are, but when God, at his own sovereign time comes, we will both go where she is. 
With all our hearts, we have accepted the call of God over our daughter Israella.вҖқ

snippet.title: HIGHLIGHTS | Leicester 0-2 Man City | MENDY & JESUS
snippet.description:
City moved to within 11 points of a third Premier League title in four years with a flawless 2-0 win over high-flying Leicester.
Dominating from start to finish, Pep Guardiola's side are now 17 points clear of second-place Manchester United with goals from Benjamin Mendy and Gabriel Jesus the reward for a commanding display at the King Power Stadium.

READ THE MATCH REPORT HERE: https://www.mancity.com/news/mens/leicester-city-0-2-manchester-city-match-report-3-april-2021-63753063

Pep speaks to the press ahead of tomorrow's trip to the King Power!

snippet.title: WATCH | Noxolo Grootboom at a loss for words as Ramaphosa shifts 'family meeting' for last bulletin
snippet.description:

snippet.title: Uzalo S7 -  Eps 15
snippet.description:
Mr Mbatha gets the shock of his life. Nosipho cracks the whip with the salon ladies. An oblivious Nkunzi is planning a surprise for MaNgcobo.

Download the free VIU app from your Android Play Store or Apple iStore today. Catch the new season S6 of Uzalo  at 20:30 ( Mon-Fri) on SABC 1, and here on YouTube at 21:00.

UZALO tells the story of two family dynasties and the two young men who carry their hopes and legacies as they face the complexities of money, family and love. At the heart of this series, a question is asked: In a country with a history as complex and multifaceted as South AfricaГ•s, what are the ties that bind? Is it blood-ties that make up the family unit, or the bonds forged with perfect stranger who often become dearer to us? Catch UzaloвҖҷs free catch-up service in South Africa only on MzansiвҖҷs brand new video streaming service VIU.

snippet.title: Prince Philip dies: Queen faces a future without her вҖҳstrength and stayвҖҷ | ITV News
snippet.description:
After over 70 years with him by her side, Queen Elizabeth must now face a future without Philip, the man she once honoured as her "strength and stay", the longest serving royal consort in British history.вҖҜ 

Elizabeth II has become the first reigning widow monarch since Queen Victoria, who was so devastated by the death of Prince Albert, she withdrew almost entirely from public life for 40 years and become known as the вҖҳWidow of WindsorвҖҷ.

snippet.title: Taylor Swift - Mr. Perfectly Fine (TaylorвҖҷs Version) (From The Vault) (Lyric Video)
snippet.description:
Official lyric video for вҖңMr. Perfectly FineвҖқ (TaylorвҖҷs Version) (From The Vault) вҖ“ off her upcoming Fearless (TaylorвҖҷs Version) album. Get the album here: https://taylor.lnk.to/fearlesstaylorsversion. Get the song here: https://taylor.lnk.to/mpf

в–әSubscribe to Taylor Swift on YouTube: https://ts.lnk.to/subscribe 
 
в–әExclusive Merch: http://taylorswift.lnk.to/store

в–әFollow Taylor Swift online:
Instagram: http://instagram.com/taylorswift  
Facebook: http://facebook.com/taylorswift  
Tumblr: http://taylorswift.tumblr.com  
Twitter: http://twitter.com/taylorswift13  
Snapchat: http://snapchat.com/add/taylorswift
Website: http://www.taylorswift.com  

в–әFollow Taylor Nation Online
Instagram: http://instagram.com/taylornation  
Tumblr: http://taylornation.tumblr.com  
Twitter: http://twitter.com/taylornation13
TikTok: http://tiktok.com/@taylornation

Official Lyrics:
 
Mr. perfect face
Mr. here to stay
Mr. looked me in the eye and told me you would never go away
Everything was right
Mr. IвҖҷve been waiting for you all my life
Mr. every single day until the end I will be by your side
But that was when I got to know
Mr. change of heart
Mr. leaves me all alone
I fall apart
It takes everything in me just to get up each day
But itвҖҷs wonderful to see that youвҖҷre okay

Hello, Mr. perfectly fine
HowвҖҷs your heart after breaking mine?
Mr. always at the right place at the right time, baby
Hello, Mr. casually cruel
Mr. everything revolves around you
IвҖҷve been Miss misery since your goodbye
And youвҖҷre Mr. perfectly fine

Mr. never told me why
Mr. never had to see me cry
Mr. insincere apology so he doesnвҖҷt look like the bad guy
He goes about his day
Forgets he ever even heard my name
Well I thought you might be different than the rest
I guess youвҖҷre all the same
Because I hear heвҖҷs got his arm вҖҳround a brand new girl
IвҖҷve been picking up my heart
HeвҖҷs been picking up her
And I never got past what you put me through
But itвҖҷs wonderful to see that it never phased you

Repeat chorus

So dignified in your well pressed suit
So strategized
All the eyes on you
Sashay your way to your seat
ItвҖҷs the best seat
In the best room
Oh, heвҖҷs so smug
Mr. always wins
So far above me in every sense
So far above feeling anything

And itвҖҷs really such a shame
ItвҖҷs such a shame
Cause I was Miss here to stay
Now IвҖҷm Miss gonna be alright someday
And someday maybe youвҖҷll miss me
But by then youвҖҷll be Mr. too late

Goodbye, Mr. perfectly fine
HowвҖҷs your heart after breaking mine?
Mr. always at the right place at the right time, baby
Goodbye, Mr. casually cruel
Mr. everything revolves around you
IвҖҷve been Miss misery for the last time
And youвҖҷre Mr. perfectly fine
YouвҖҷre perfectly fine
Mr. look me in the eye and tell me you

#taylorswift #mrperfectlyfine #fromthevault #fearlesstaylorsversion

snippet.title: BMW M4 v AMG C63 v Audi RS5 - DRAG RACE
snippet.description:
Need help buying your next car? Click https://www.carwow.co.uk/-help-me-carwowвҖӢ and my team and I will help you choose your ideal car at a fair price - from Mat Watson!
.............................................................

HowвҖҷs this for an all-new epic drag race! 

WeвҖҷve got Mat in the all-new BMW M4, and heвҖҷs lining up alongside the Mercedes-AMG C63 S & Audi RS5!

So how do they match up? First up we've got the M4, and under the bonnet youвҖҷll find a 3-litre straight-six which can deliver 510hp & 660Nm of torque. 

As for the AMG, well itвҖҷs not too different. It may have a 4-litre twin-turbo V8 instead, but it can also deliver 510hp, coupled with 700Nm. Finally we have the RS5, which has a 2.9-litre V6 which can put down 450hp and 600Nm of torque. 

Think the Audi is the underdog? Well it has one key benefit - Quattro AWD! As for both the BMW and AMG? Well, they've only got RWD! Will that make the difference? YouвҖҷll have to keep watching to find out!

Check out our German YouTube channel - https://www.youtube.com/carwow-Deutschland

snippet.title: Piers Morgan Wants Names! His New Demand for Meghan Markle
snippet.description:
Piers Morgan wants answers in the wake of Prince Harry and Meghan MarkleвҖҷs tell-all interview with Oprah.
 
Weeks after walking off the set of вҖңGood Morning Britain, вҖңExtraвҖҷsвҖқ Billy Bush spoke with Piers, who talked about Meghan Markle's allegations against the royal family, saying he wants names.
 
Morgan also discussed Sharon Osbourne, вҖңcancel culture,вҖқ and whatвҖҷs next for him.

snippet.title: The National Debt: Last Week Tonight with John Oliver (HBO)
snippet.description:

en trek die skoen aan wat jou pas
vertrek op die ritme van jou hart

snippet.title: Uzalo S7 -  Eps 13
snippet.description:
MaNgcobo gets the ball rolling on the heist. MaMkhize uses force to disperse Church Members. MaMlambo is cyberbullied.

Download the free VIU app from your Android Play Store or Apple iStore today. Catch the new season S6 of Uzalo  at 20:30 ( Mon-Fri) on SABC 1, and here on YouTube at 21:00.

UZALO tells the story of two family dynasties and the two young men who carry their hopes and legacies as they face the complexities of money, family and love. At the heart of this series, a question is asked: In a country with a history as complex and multifaceted as South AfricaГ•s, what are the ties that bind? Is it blood-ties that make up the family unit, or the bonds forged with perfect stranger who often become dearer to us? Catch UzaloвҖҷs free catch-up service in South Africa only on MzansiвҖҷs brand new video streaming service VIU.

snippet.title: Intaba Yase Dubai - Sbali (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
Sometimes all you can do is admire from a distance all that you love wholeheartedly, knowing that being close, will be hard yet attainable. That is what Intaba Yase Dubai tells us in is his Zulu debut single titled #Sbali

Song: Sbali
Artist: Intaba Yase Dubai
Written by: Intaba Yase Dubai and Kgosi Mahumapelo
Composer: Bafana Makudulela, Kgosi Mahumapelo, Siyabonga Mkhize and Cwenga Mbele
Music Publisher: Ambitiouz Group PTY LTD

Lyrics: 
Uma ngingakuxoxela indabвҖҷongayazi
Ngicela ungathwali izandlвҖҷekhanda
NgicelвҖҷungamangali.
Mina ngingakuxoxela indabвҖҷongayazi
Engakuthwalisa izandla ekhanda 
NgicelвҖҷungamangali.
Sengahlale ngiphethe isthombe sakho ephaketheni 
Ngoba ngihlale nginethemba ukuthi ngizokubona
Sengahlale ngphethe isthombe sakho 
Ephaketheni phela inhliziyo iyagxumagxuma mangikbona.
Uyajabula umphefumulo, kimi ufana nesbuko 
EngathвҖҷungahlala useduze nami
UzвҖҷungkhonzele kubafwenu 
UzвҖҷubaxoxele ngelinyвҖҷilanga ngizoba wu sbali
Ngifuna ukuba wu sbali
Lentombi kumele kube ngeyami
Ngifuna ukuba wu sbali
Lentombi kumele kube ngeyami.


(Verse 1)
Mina uma ngivuka we dali
Ngicabanga wena ekhanda lami
Ngiyazi uyazibuza ke manje
Ukuthi why ngingakuqondi ngikutshele lendaba
Hay ukuthi ngiyakusaba 
Indlela engikuhlonipha ngayo
Angifuni uthi nginamanga lento into eyenzakalayo 
Ukube nginamandla bengizovele ngiyifake emaphepheni 
Uvele udume umhlaba wonke njengosheleni
Ngihlanyiswa isithombe sakho 
Lesi engisiphethe ephaketheni lami
Isona esingenza ngbone impilo esangihlalele emhlabeni
Mina anginalutho esandleni 
Ngizokupha okusenhlizweni yami ungunaphakade  
Bahlale bengibuza abangani
Bethi why ngingasiloyi lesithombe sakho

(Chorus)
Uyajabula umphefumulo, kimi ufana nesbuko 
EngathвҖҷungahlala useduze nami
UzвҖҷungkhonzele kubafwenu 
UzвҖҷubaxoxele ngelinyвҖҷilanga ngizoba wu sbali
Ngifuna ukuba wu sbali
Lentombi kumele kube ngeyami
Ngifuna ukuba wu sbali
Lentombi kumele kube ngeyami.




(Verse 2)
Sengiqala ukulibuka nangamehlo enqondo 
Usuku lwamalobolo 
Obvious ngzobe senginemali eningi 
Nigyow spenda wonke umholo
Usuyongixolisela kwabomndeni 
Mina angizwani neyikoloto 
Mina ngiyabhadala
Sengisho ukuthi noma bengakhalanga   
Uthando lwakho lufana no Amen enhlizweni yami 
Lufika njalo mangithandaza.
Ngiye ngithi mhla ngayeba inhliziyo yakho 
Ngalolosuku kuyogijima iveni
Umjuluko uyobe uzehlela ebusweni 
Kubafwenu mhla ngidla amanzi e-orintshi
Sekumele babize umfana omncane ngo sbali 
Isimo sobe siphoqa ngalesosikhathi kuyobe kuymina oholile
Angibona laba abathi khona abazokwenza 
Khona i chappies uma isiphelile hey mina.

(Chorus)
Uyajabula umphefumulo, kimi ufana nesbuko 
EngathвҖҷungahlala useduze nami
UzвҖҷungkhonzele kubafwenu 
UzвҖҷubaxoxele ngelinyвҖҷilanga ngizoba wu sbali
Ngifuna ukuba wu sbali
Lentombi kumele kube ngeyami
Ngifuna ukuba wu sbali
Lentombi kumele kube ngeyami.

(Bridge)
Uma ngingakuxoxela indabвҖҷongayazi
Ngicela ungathwali izandlвҖҷekhanda
NgicelвҖҷungamangali.
Mina ngingakuxoxela indabвҖҷongayazi
Engakuthwalisa izandla ekhanda 
NgicelвҖҷungamangali.
Ngifuna ukuba wu sbali

Lentombi kumele kube ngeyami.

Uma ngingakuxoxela indabвҖҷongayazi
Ngicela ungathwali izandlвҖҷekhanda

snippet.title: Suez Canal reopens after giant stranded ship is freed - BBC News
snippet.description:
Traffic has resumed in the Suez Canal after a giant, stranded container ship blocking it for nearly a week was finally freed by salvage crews.

Tug boats honked their horns in celebration as the 400m-long (1,300ft) Ever Given was dislodged on Monday with the help of dredgers and tug boats.

Hundreds of ships are waiting to pass through the canal which links the Mediterranean to the Red Sea via Egypt.

It is one of the world's busiest trade routes.

Please subscribe HERE http://bit.ly/1rbfUog

#BBCNews

snippet.title: $1,018 Nike "Satan Shoes" by Lil Nas X Unboxing
snippet.description:
The very unique and limited Satan Shoe is a base Nike Air Max 97 by MSCHF and Lil Nas X, with the air bubble containing 60cc ink and one drop of human blood. Each shoe is uniquely numbered between 1/666 and 666/666 and sells for $1,018. In addition, each shoe has the bible verse Luke 10:18, an upside-down cross, and a handmade bronze pentagram with custom engraving. Satan Shoes Instagram - http://instagram.com/mikethecompass

YouTube Playlist: https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLWrsZwkJoxJVX8flcAwW0oz_ySRDCoHRv

snippet.title: Lil Nas X "Montero (Call Me By Your Name)" Official Lyrics & Meaning | Verified
snippet.description:
Lil Nas XвҖҷs вҖңMONTERO (Call Me By Your Name)вҖқ is his latest hit, with the music video racking up over 32 million views since it dropped on Friday. Produced by Roy Lenzo, Omer Fedi, and Take a Daytrip, the song first popped up as an Instagram snippet and later appeared in a Logitech Super Bowl commercial. It is the second single from his upcoming album of the same name, which is expected to drop this summer.

вҖңMONTERO (Call Me By Your Name)вҖқ is inspired by a former relationship, with lyrics that reflect the artistвҖҷs journey to accepting his sexuality.

snippet.title: Goodbye Old Stuff! Hammer Jam is BACK! (Clash Of Clans Official)
snippet.description:
The Hammer Jam event is back and it's the season of upgrades! Take full advantage of the 50% Home Village building cost reduction, and get ready for the first update of the year that's coming veeeery soon! рҹ‘Җ


Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter в–ә https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram в–әhttps://www.instagram.com/clashofclans 
Facebook в–әhttps://www.facebook.com/ClashofClans 

Attack. Defend. Strategize. Download for free for mobile devices. http://supr.cl/ThisArmy

From rage-Вӯfilled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

Chief, are you having problems? Visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/clas...

Privacy Policy:
http://www.supercell.net/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://www.supercell.net/terms-of-ser...

ParentвҖҷs Guide:
http://www.supercell.net/parents

snippet.title: Giveon - Heartbreak Anniversary (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
"When It's All Said And Done...Take Time" available at: https://Giveon.lnk.to/WhenItsAllSaidAndDone_TakeTime
"Heartbreak Anniversary" Official Audio: https://youtu.be/nja_0BaQcNg

Follow Giveon:
Instagram:  https://www.instagram.com/giveon/?hl=en
Twitter:  https://twitter.com/giveon?lang=en
Facebook:  https://www.facebook.com/Giveonmusic/
Soundcloud:  https://soundcloud.com/giveon

Lyrics:
Ooh

Balloons are deflated
Guess they look lifeless like me
We miss you on your side of the bed, mmm
Still got your things here
And they stare at me like souvenirs
Don't wanna let you out my head

Just like the day that I met you, the day I thought forever
Said that you love me, but that'll last for never
It's cold outside like when you walked out my life
Why you walk out my life?

I get like this every time
On these days that feel like you and me
Heartbreak anniversary
'Cause I remember every time
On these days that feel like you and me
Heartbreak anniversary, do you ever think of me?
(Oh-ooh) No
(Ooh) No, no, no
(Ooh, ooh) Ooh, nah (Ooh)

I'm buildin' my hopes up
Like presents unopened to this day
I still see the messages you read, mmm
I'm foolishly patient (Foolishly patient)
Can't get past the taste of your lips (Taste of your lips)
Don't wanna let you out my head

Just like the day that I met you, the day I thought forever
Said that you love me but that'll last for never
It's cold outside like when you walked out my life
Why you walk out my life? (My life)

I get like this every time
On these days that feel like you and me
Heartbreak anniversary
'Cause I remember every time
On these days that feel like you and me
Heartbreak anniversary, do you ever think of me?
(Oh-ooh) Of me
(Ooh) 'Cause I think of you, think of you
(Ooh, ooh, ooh-ooh)

(C) 2021 Epic Records. With Not So Fast LLC.

#Giveon #HeartbreakAnniversary #WhenItsAllSaidAndDoneTakeTime

snippet.title: President Biden falls on Air Force One stairs
snippet.description:
President Joe Biden has fallen on the stairs of Air Force One while boarding the aircraft.

Mr Biden, who was on his way to Atlanta, appeared unhurt and carried on unaided.

snippet.title: Glitterbomb Trap Catches Phone Scammer (who gets arrested)
snippet.description:
I glitterbombed my way up the scammer chain of command.  Come join me in my Creative Engineering class!! https://Monthly.com/MarkRober

If you suspect that you or a loved one has been the victim of fraud, you can call or visit the National Elder Fraud hotline (https://stopelderfraud.ovc.ojp.gov/)  at 833-372-8311 and report it to the FTC by visiting the agencyвҖҷs website (https://reportfraud.ftc.gov/#/) or calling 877-382-4357.

snippet.title: Lamborghini Urus v BMW X6M - DRAG RACE
snippet.description:
Need help buying your next car? Click https://www.carwow.co.uk/-help-me-carwow and my team and I will help you choose your ideal car at a fair price - from Mat Watson!
.............................................................

Check out Yiannimize - http://youtube.com/yiannimize

ItвҖҷs Saturday morning, so you know what time it isвҖҰ Time for another Mat vs Yianni showdown!! 

WeвҖҷve got a BMW X6M Competition going up against a Lamborghini Urus (no prizes for guessing whoвҖҷs in which car)! These two SUV heavyweights are going head-to-head over the quarter-mile, and when looking at stats alone, you might think itвҖҷll be an easy win for the Urus! 

Under the LamboвҖҷs bonnet, youвҖҷll find a 4-litre twin-turbo V8 which can deliver 650hp and 850Nm. As for the BMW, it may pack a 4.4-litre twin-turbo V8, but it only puts down 625hp & 750Nm! But thatвҖҷs not allвҖҰ The Urus is also 200kg lighter than the X6M! 

Now, of course, we know the BMW has one trick up its sleeve - an EPIC launch system! The question is, will it be enough to snatch the win on this wet track? ThereвҖҷs only one way to find outвҖҰ LETвҖҷS RACE!

.............................................................

snippet.title: CBC News: The National | Meghan and HarryвҖҷs Oprah interview; Vaccine optimism | March 7, 2021
snippet.description:
Prince Harry and Meghan sit down with Oprah for a revealing interview about leaving their roles as senior royals. The reasons to be optimistic about the vaccine rollout and the road ahead. Plus, the officer charged with killing George Floyd goes on trial. 

#HarryandMeghan
#COVID19
#GeorgeFloyd

00:00 The National for March 7, 2021
01:06 Harry and Meghan's Oprah interview
06:32 Multiple donors for same WE Charity project
09:28 Vaccines wonвҖҷt be end of masks, distancing,
11:36 Canada's COVID-19 vaccine rollout 
12:14 Ontario pharmacies vaccine pilot project 
14:19 Easing COVID-19 restrictions 
14:41 Rally for return of youth sports in Quebec 
16:51 Questions about DHL 'hidden fees'
19:16 Violence continue to escalate in Myanmar
19:40 Pope preaches peace during Iraq visit 
22:55 George Floyd murder trial 
27:46 COVID-19 Pandemic: One Year Later 
28:21 What year two of the pandemic might look like
31:19 Helping seniors access COVID-19 vaccines
34:30 Alberta MLA monitored by police
43:30 Shell Alberta to use robotic dogs 
44:03 The Moment: From Prairies to Bollywood

The National is CBC's flagship nightly news program, featuring the day's top stories with in-depth and original journalism, with hosts Adrienne Arsenault and Andrew Chang in Toronto, Ian Hanomansing in Vancouver and the CBC's chief political correspondent, Rosemary Barton in Ottawa.

snippet.title: losing control : Dancing with the Devil
snippet.description:
вҖңI crossed a line IвҖҷd never crossed in addiction.вҖқ 

In part I of this fearless documentary series, Demi Lovato and her family and friends candidly open up for the first time about what led to her near-fatal overdose.

Resources:
 
The National Eating Disorders Association (NEDA) helpline
1-800-931-2237 (they also offer click-to-chat messaging) 
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org
 
SAMHSA Hotline for individuals and family members facing mental health and/or substance use disorders
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
If you need immediate support, please reach out to your local crisis text line:
USA: Text HOME to 741741
UK: Text SHOUT to 85258
Canada: Text CONNECT to 686868 or 741741

Production Companies: OBB Pictures, SB Films
Director: Michael D. Ratner
Executive Producers: Michael D. Ratner, Scott Ratner, Scooter Braun, Allison Kaye, Scott Manson, Kfir Goldberg, Miranda Sherman, Andy Mininger


Pre-order Demi LovatoвҖҷs new album вҖҳDancing With The DevilвҖҰ The Art Of Starting OverвҖҷ https://DemiLovato.lnk.to/DWTDTAOSOID

es-419.description:
"CrucГ© una lГӯnea que nunca habГӯa cruzado en la adicciГіn".

En la primera parte de esta valiente serie documental, Demi Lovato, su familia y amigos revelan por primera vez lo que la llevГі a una sobredosis casi mortal.

Recursos:

LГӯnea de ayuda de la AsociaciГіn Nacional de Trastornos Alimentarios (NEDA)
1-800-931-2237 (tambiГ©n ofrecen chat en lГӯnea)
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org

LГӯnea directa de la SAMHSA para personas y familiares que se enfrentan a trastornos de salud mental y/o consumo de sustancias
1-800-662-HELP (4357)
TTY: 1-800-487-4889

O si necesitas apoyo inmediato, contacta por SMS a tu centro de ayuda local:
EE.UU.: EnvГӯa el mensaje HOME al 741741
REINO UNIDO: EnvГӯa el mensaje SHOUT al 85258
CanadГЎ: EnvГӯa el mensaje CONNECT al 686868 o al 741741

fr.title: La perte de contrГҙle : Dancing with the Devil
fr.description:
вҖңJ'ai dГ©passГ© les limites de ma dГ©pendance.вҖқ 

Dans la premiГЁre partie de cette courageuse sГ©rie documentaire, Demi Lovato, sa famille et ses amis Г©voquent en toute franchise pour la premiГЁre fois ce qui l'a conduite Г  son overdose quasi fatale.

Ressources :
 
Plateforme d'Г©coute de la National Eating Disorders Association (NEDA)
1-800-931-2237 (chat en ligne disponible)

en.title: losing control : Dancing with the Devil
en.description:
вҖңI crossed a line IвҖҷd never crossed in addiction.вҖқ 

In part I of this fearless documentary series, Demi Lovato and her family and friends candidly open up for the first time about what led to her near-fatal overdose.

Resources:
 
The National Eating Disorders Association (NEDA) helpline
1-800-931-2237 (they also offer click-to-chat messaging) 
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org
 
SAMHSA Hotline for individuals and family members facing mental health and/or substance use disorders
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
If you need immediate support, please reach out to your local crisis text line:
USA: Text HOME to 741741
UK: Text SHOUT to 85258
Canada: Text CONNECT to 686868 or 741741

Production Companies: OBB Pictures, SB Films
Director: Michael D. Ratner
Executive Producers: Michael D. Ratner, Scott Ratner, Scooter Braun, Allison Kaye, Scott Manson, Kfir Goldberg, Miranda Sherman, Andy Mininger


Pre-order Demi LovatoвҖҷs new album вҖҳDancing With The DevilвҖҰ The Art Of Starting OverвҖҷ https://DemiLovato.lnk.to/DWTDTAOSOID

snippet.title: Dax - APOCALYPSE (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
Are we near an Apocalypse. Are the end of times really closing in. This second acts a pre secondary installment to my song called Book of Revelations. If you have time go check that out after along with Dear God. I think this topic is important. What are your thoughts on a ZOMBIE APOCALYPSE?  Let me know in the comment section as I love to read and reply to as many as I can. Do you believe God is soon returning? This song is meant to create a discussion. Thank you. Let's share and make an impact. My name is Dax and I am an artist who is currently creating something out of absolutely nothing.
 
Share and help spread the message...

Click here to listen: https://ingroov.es/apocalypse-pc

Follow Dax: thatsdax
Shot By: Logan Meis
Produced by: Lex Nour Beats

#Apocalypse #bookofrevelation #God #dax

LYRICS:

I see violence
Oh
And I hear sirens
Uh oh oh
No where to go
No where to run
They gave me the shot
They took away guns
nothing to eat
We canвҖҷt go to sleep
WeвҖҷre stuck in our homes
TheyвҖҷre flooding the streets
Everyone watching and glued to their screens 
misinformation like every week
APOCALYPSE!

This ainвҖҷt no game better choose your side and protect your soul 
devil is lurking heвҖҷs looking for victims in power to use and regain his control
No one to trust everybodyвҖҷs corrupt
End of the world really feels like itвҖҷs close
Feels like itвҖҷs Truman and IвҖҷm just a person theyвҖҷre watching at home on a evening show
Fake information and all of itвҖҷs free 
Dumb politicians, Corrupt police
Tanks and riots, bodies piling, smell of 
corruption is flooding the streets
Children are crying thereвҖҷs nothing to eat
Left and right thereвҖҷs no in between 
Who do we trust when itвҖҷs us against us and weвҖҷll do anything just to get a retweet
2021вҖҷs no joke boy you better stay inside pray to God during these times
Let me you give some advice, at night, stay inside, your life has a price, they will buy
EverybodyвҖҷs trying to fight, gas prices spiked, no bus canвҖҷt walk we canвҖҷt drive
Everybody's on edge, trying to get ahead, so IвҖҷm chucking up this peace sign
Let me get into the real
They I donвҖҷt care how you feel
YouвҖҷre just animal and youвҖҷre their next meal
ThereвҖҷs no peace 
I pray to god on my knees
The gates of hell open are we can all feel that heat
I remember when everything changed
When Technology went from an aid to the primary poison of all of our Brains
WeвҖҷve been programmed to think that we need it we slave and we worship it everyday 
and in every way weвҖҷre becoming the robot they gave us and losing humanities way

I see violence
Oh
And I hear sirens
Uh oh oh
No where to go
No where to run
They gave me the shot
They took away guns
nothing to eat
We canвҖҷt go to sleep
WeвҖҷre stuck in our homes
TheyвҖҷre flooding the streets
Everyone watching and glued to they screens 
misinformation like every week
APOCALYPSE!

If you're a soldier stand up ya know
Stay 10 ten toes
look em face 
donвҖҷt you fold
TheyвҖҷre watching your moves I hope that you know
People are dying because of religion 
Selling sex, selling children 
Genocides, waters rise, Homicides, missing women, 
rich got richer
what did they do? 
man they cut out small business 
fake statistics, 
flood the streets with drugs and filled up all the prisons 
TheyвҖҷre shifting the energy 
You canвҖҷt see the enemy
God is returning they donвҖҷt got to say it the climates been telling me
From way the theyвҖҷre abusing the teachings and pushing religion like itвҖҷs an accessory
Pick a side itвҖҷs the dark or the light, in the scariest times that weвҖҷve seen in a century

I see violence
Oh
And I hear sirens
Uh oh oh
No where to go
No where to run
They gave me the shot
They took away guns
nothing to eat

snippet.description:
вҖңBeautiful MistakesвҖқ featuring Megan Thee Stallion is out now: https://maroon5.lnk.to/BeautifulMistakesвҖӢ
 
For more, visit:

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/maroon5вҖӢ
Twitter: https://twitter.com/maroon5вҖӢ

Not holding on
Not holding on
IвҖҷm just depressed that youвҖҷre gone

snippet.title: reclaiming power : Dancing with the Devil
snippet.description:
вҖңYou really find out whoвҖҷs there for you when the world falls out from under your feet.вҖқ
Demi goes to rehab and begins her road to recovery, but with bumps along the way. As she returns to the stage for the first time since her overdose, she needs to find balance in her life.
Resources:
 
SAMHSA Hotline for individuals and family members facing mental health and/or substance use disorders
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
National Sexual Assault Hotline
www.rainn.org
1-800-656-HOPE (4673)
 
Or if you need immediate support, please reach out to your local crisis text line:
USA: Text HOME to 741741
UK: Text SHOUT to 85258

Dua Lipa - Levitating ft. @DaBaby / Don't Start Now (Live at the GRAMMYs 2021)

Get the album Future Nostalgia : https://dualipa.co/futurenostalgiaвҖӢвҖӢ

YouTube: https://dualipa.co/youtubeвҖӢвҖӢ

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'.

#DuaLipaвҖӢ #FutureNostalgiaвҖӢ #Grammys
